scripts.dev:server:staging: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs staging node --import tsx server/index.ts
scripts.dev:server:production: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs production node --import tsx server/index.ts
scripts.start:server: npm run prisma:generate && npx prisma generate --schema prisma/v2/schema.prisma && node --import tsx server/index.ts
scripts.start:server:staging: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs staging node --import tsx server/index.ts
scripts.start:server:production: npm run prisma:generate:production && npm run prisma:v2:generate:production && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs production node --import tsx server/index.ts
scripts.build:app: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.prisma:generate:staging: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs staging npx prisma generate
scripts.prisma:generate:production: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs production npx prisma generate
scripts.prisma:v2:generate:staging: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs staging npx prisma generate --schema prisma/v2/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:v2:generate:production: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs production npx prisma generate --schema prisma/v2/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:v2:validate:staging: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs staging npx prisma validate --schema prisma/v2/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:v2:validate:production: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs production npx prisma validate --schema prisma/v2/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev:staging: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs staging npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:v2:migrate:dev:staging: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs staging npx prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/v2/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy:staging: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs staging npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy:production: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs production npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:v2:migrate:deploy:staging: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs staging npx prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/v2/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:v2:migrate:deploy:production: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs production npx prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/v2/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:seed:staging: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs staging node --import tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.prisma:seed:production: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs production node --import tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.prisma:v2:seed:staging: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs staging node --import tsx prisma/v2/seed.ts
scripts.prisma:v2:seed:production: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs production node --import tsx prisma/v2/seed.ts
